concerns.text: US-3 and FR-004 require determining a divergence threshold by maximizing F1-score against a 'labeled dataset of stable vs unstable clips'. The Idea and Methodology Sketch do not define how these ground-truth labels are generated (e.g., manual annotation vs. heuristic). Without a defined labeling protocol, the 'stable/unstable' classification is undefined, making the F1-score metric uncomputable and the threshold validation impossible.

SC-005 requires validating precision/recall against a 'manually annotated subset of 50 clips'. The Idea and Methodology do not mention manual annotation or the creation of a gold-standard subset. This introduces a new, unrequested data-creation task (manual labeling) that was not part of the original research plan.
